title: RULCHAWM KHUAAH FREE CLINIC MOBILE MEDICAL UNIT BUATSAIH A NI
content:
4955/2025-2026

Dated Aizawl, the 22nd March, 2026 :Nimin khan Mission Foundation Movement-te chuan Ministry of Tribal Affairs funding-in Rulchawm khuaah free clinic an buatsaih.

He free clinic-ah hian Dr. Rualthankhuma Renthlei, ENT leh Dr. C.K. Lalfakawmi, MBBS te'n natna hrang hrang inentir tura lo kal mi 150-te chu uluk taka lo enin, a thlawnin an mamawh damdawi pek nghal an ni.

Free clinic buatsaih a nih mek lai hian naupang accident an awm a. A hmunah first aid peka buaipui nghal an ni bawk.
